entities.name: Knowledge Write Protection
entities.context: Framework requiring zero automatic updates to knowledge base with human approval for all changes

entities.name: Personal Intelligence Privacy
entities.context: Principle that AI updates understanding autonomously but V controls what becomes official knowledge

entities.name: Proactive Engagement Boundaries
entities.context: Principle limiting engagement to weekly optional reviews at weekend timing

entities.name: Human-in-the-loop
entities.context: Required approval process for all knowledge base changes with no bypass allowed

entities.name: Observation autonomy
entities.context: AI treated as intelligent being with autonomous observation capabilities

entities.name: pending-updates/
entities.context: Staging directory where all knowledge updates are held for review

entities.name: review-pending-updates
entities.context: Command used to approve staged knowledge updates

entities.name: topics-to-revisit
entities.context: Tracking list for items requiring future attention or closure

entities.name: conversation-end
entities.context: Process during which AI autonomously updates its understanding

entities.name: Weekly reviews
entities.context: Scheduled synthesis sessions for insights and decision-making on critical items

relationships.context: All updates staged in this directory before approval
Command required to approve any knowledge changes
Human-in-the-loop is required for all changes under this framework
AI updates understanding during this process
